institution.name: Nebraska Methodist College of Nursing & Allied Health

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Nebraska Methodist College of Nursing & Allied Health fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (73.3% → 59.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Nebraska Methodist College of Nursing & Allied Health rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.2k → $17.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Nebraska Methodist College of Nursing & Allied Health rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.2k → $17.9k).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Nebraska Methodist College of Nursing & Allied Health are 20% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($65.1k vs $54.3k).
